subcodes.first_line: O ye two souls serene! In this Dispensation of trials, turn ye your countenance from the fire of tribulation like unto pure gold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو نفس مطمئنه در این کور امتحان از آتش افتتان چون ذهب آبریز رخ بتابید و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
